name: schemechat
description: Connect Codex to a running local SchemeChat workspace through a loopback MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to a running SchemeChat multi-AI discussion workspace
interface.longDescription: Use SchemeChat from Codex to inspect local panes, capture replies, inject drafts, and submit prompts against a running desktop discussion workspace.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my SchemeChat panes and tell me which providers are active.
Capture the latest replies from my SchemeChat discussion panes.
Inject a short draft into selected SchemeChat panes and submit it.
